race.description: BUSY AT WORK NATIONAL APPRENTICE SERIES C1 PLATE
race.comment: DIVERSITY (10) was close enough on the turn but lacked the turn of foot required when resuming over 1400m at this track last start. Went to a mile second-up last prep and led all the way for a comfortable win. Perfectly placed to chalk up a second career success. HEROIC REBEL (3) started favourite but was edged out in a real thriller over 1666m at Ipswich last time out. Ideally drawn and will be cherry ripe at the third run back from a spell. The consistent INSIDE PASSAGE (8) grabbed a well-deserved maiden win recently over 1640m at Doomben but had to call on all reserves to get the cash. That win was five weeks ago which is the only query. CLIVE'S GLORY (7) led from the outset and had to dig deep to register his maiden win last start over 1400m at the Sunshine Coast. Lightly raced three-year-old who should appreciate getting over more ground now. GREY IMPACT (9) doesn't salute out of turn but is worth throwing in the exotics.
